title: Deawy's Fresh Gemstones
description: This resource pack adds new Diamond, Emerald, Amethyst, Lapis lazuli, Quartz and Prismarine shards textures to make them feel more fresh!
body:
This resource pack adds new Diamond, Emerald, Amethyst, Lapis lazuli, Quartz and Prismarine shards textures to make them feel more fresh!

![Pack Ttitle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b004a27bd00b98ab7341846a0a6f13529d1e553e.png)

Here is an image of all the gems that the pack covers:

(All gems of the "#c:gems" tag)


![All the updated textures.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/246eb1000451a26423502d562aa26d00fc276fd9.png)
